heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 96–465, title II, § 2205(1)94 Stat. 2159Oct. 17, 1980
label: 801 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 96–465, title II, § 2205(1)94 Stat. 2159Oct. 17, 1980
notes: Section, , , set forth Congressional declaration of objectives for this chapter.act Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 957, title I, § 11160 Stat. 999

The following provisions of the Foreign Service Act of 1946 (approved , ), which had been set out as notes under this section, were repealed by , , :Aug. 13, 1946, ch. 95760 Stat. 999Pub. L. 96–465, title II, § 2205(1)94 Stat. 2159Oct. 17, 1980

Title I, § 101, , which provided that titles I through X of act , which enacted this chapter and amended section 681 of former Title 5, Executive Departments and Government Officers and Employees, be cited as the “Foreign Service Act of 1946”.60 Stat. 999Aug. 13, 1946
Title X, § 1061, , which provided that chapter be construed liberally.60 Stat. 1032

Title X, § 1062, , which provided that if any provision of this chapter or the application of any such provision to any person or circumstance be held invalid, the validity of the remainder of the chapter or the application thereof not be affected.60 Stat. 1033

Title X, § 1063, , which provided that the title, part, and section headings of this chapter were inserted for convenience and, in the case of conflict between such headings and substance of the titles, parts, or sections, the heading be disregarded.60 Stat. 1033

Title X, § 1064, , which provided that nothing in this chapter be construed to affect provisions of , §§ 1–4, , formerly set out as a note under , and that “classified grades” under that Act be construed to mean classes 1 to 5, inclusive.60 Stat. 1033act July 3, 1946, ch. 35960 Stat. 426section 906 of this title
Title X, § 1071, , which authorized appropriations to carry out the purposes of this chapter.60 Stat. 1033

Title XI, § 1122, , which provided that funds appropriated to Department of State for fiscal year 1947, under the caption “Foreign Service”, be available for purposes of this chapter and authorized additional appropriations as required to carry out this chapter.60 Stat. 1035

Title XI, § 1132, , which provided that any section not expressly repealed by this chapter but which is inconsistent with any provisions of this chapter shall be considered as having been amended or superseded by this chapter.60 Stat. 1040

Title XI, § 1133, , which provided that repeal of sections by this chapter should not in any way affect acts done or rights accruing or accrued, or any suits or proceedings had or commenced in any civil case, prior to such repeal, but that all rights and liabilities should continue as if such repeal had not been made.60 Stat. 1040

Title XI, § 1134, , which provided that repeal of any section by this chapter shall not be construed as a revival, up to effective date of this chapter, of any section which may have been previously repealed by implication.60 Stat. 1040

Title XI, § 1135, , which provided that notwithstanding provisions of this chapter, existing rules, regulations, and Executive orders remain in effect until revoked or modified, unless clearly inconsistent with the provisions of this chapter.60 Stat. 1040
Title XI, § 1141, , which provided that this chapter be effective three months following .60 Stat. 1040Aug. 13, 1946
Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Feb. 15, 1981section 2403 of Pub. L. 96–465section 3901 of this title

Short Title of 1965 Amendment, , , which provided that be cited as the “Foreign Service Annuity Adjustment Act of 1965”, was repealed by , .Pub. L. 89–308, § 179 Stat. 1129Pub. L. 89–308Pub. L. 96–465, title II, § 2205(16)94 Stat. 2160Oct. 31, 1965Oct. 17, 1980
